translation_notes: Signal requires 20-day momentum divergence detection. Momentum is not directly available in the indicator list. Used MACD histogram as a leading momentum proxy (macd_hist approximates momentum direction). Bullish divergence: price declining (close < prev_close) AND momentum rising (macd_hist > prev_macd_hist). Bearish divergence: price rising (close > prev_close) AND momentum falling (macd_hist < prev_macd_hist). Exit conditions reversed from entry (AUTHOR_SILENT interpreted as trend reversal). Note: True 20-day momentum calculation (ROC or price change) is not available; MACD histogram serves as a substitute momentum indicator.
